title: CSS Variable System Setup
description: Implement CSS variable system in :host selector with ui-ux-pro-max design tokens. Create 25+ CSS variables covering colors, spacing, typography, transitions, and radii following the pattern from ccc-smart-component-manager/panel/styles.css. Variables must support Slate palette (#0F172A background, #22C55E CTA) with 4.5:1 contrast ratios.

criteria: 25+ CSS variables defined in :host selector: verify by grep -c '^\s*--' file >= 25
convergence.definition_of_done: CSS variable system foundation established with all design tokens defined

files.change: Add CSS variable definitions to :host selector in style property (lines 11-22)

implementation.title: Define color variables
implementation.description: Add color design tokens following Slate palette and ui-ux-pro-max specifications
logic_flow: Add color variables after existing :host properties
Verify 4.5:1 contrast ratio for text on backgrounds

implementation.title: Define spacing and typography variables
implementation.description: Add spacing scale and typography design tokens
modification_points: Add font-family variable: --font-ui with system fallbacks
logic_flow: Add spacing variables after color variables
Use values from pattern reference styles.css

implementation.title: Define transition and radius variables
implementation.description: Add transition timing and border radius design tokens
logic_flow: Add transition variables with cubic-bezier easing
Verify timing is within 150-300ms range for micro-interactions

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for artifact paths and smart context
Analyze current :host selector structure to understand insertion point
Reference CSS variable patterns from styles.css

rationale.css_variables: Adopt CSS variable system for maintainability while keeping single theme (no theme switching complexity)

risks: Variable naming must follow kebab-case convention
